fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Iowa Audiologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a audiologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Iowa - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: audiologist license reciprocity iowa, how to transfer audiologist license to iowa, audiologist compact iowa, iowa audiologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Speech Pathology and Audiology
board.parent_dept: Iowa Department of Inspections, Appeals and Licensing
board.mailing_address:
Iowa Department of Health and Human Services
Professional Licensure
Lucas State Office Building
321 E 12th St
Des Moines, IA 50319-0075

quick_facts.ce_requirement: 30 hours of continuing education every 2 years

license_types.title: AuD, CCC-A
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a audiologist in Iowa.

steps.title: Create an Online Account
steps.description: Register for a new user account on the Iowa Board of Professional Licensure's Online Services portal (ibplicense.iowa.gov) to begin your application.

steps.title: Submit Online Application
steps.description: Log in to your IBPL Online Services account, select "New Application," choose "Audiologist," and complete all sections of the application form.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Pay the required $120 application fee online via the Iowa Board of Professional Licensure's Online Services portal.

steps.title: Submit Official Transcripts
steps.description: Arrange for official transcripts confirming a Master's or Doctoral degree in Audiology from an accredited program to be sent directly from your educational institution to the Board.

steps.title: Provide Examination Verification
steps.description: Submit verification of a passing score on the national examination in audiology (Praxis Series). If you hold the Certificate of Clinical Competence in Audiology (CCC-A) from ASHA, arrange for official verification to be sent directly to the Board, which often satisfies both examination and supervised experience requirements.

steps.title: Await Board Review
steps.description: The Board will review your complete application and all supporting documents. Monitor your IBPL Online Services account for updates on your application status.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the Praxis Exam in Audiology.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the Praxis. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Audiologists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Iowa audiologist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the Praxis Exam in Audiology is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Iowa have reciprocity for audiologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Iowa participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Iowa without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my audiologist license to Iowa?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Iowa while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Audiologists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Audiologist in Iowa
hero.dek: To apply for an Audiologist license in Iowa, create an account and complete the application through the Iowa Board of Professional Licensure's Online Services portal.

official_links.portal_name: Iowa Board of Professional Licensure's Online Services
official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the Iowa Board of Professional Licensure's Online Services portal, click on "New Account Registration," and follow the prompts to create a new user account with a valid email and password. Once registered, log in to your account.
